paragraphs.text: I need to tell you something. On one preview article , I told you you can train your AI privately in order to think like an industrial automation engineer. Let's see in real example one use case to train your private AI on your commissioning notes.

Let's imagine you have finished to commission one system. Then, you want to write a report to discuss with the client about what was the good things that happened and what was the bad things that you can improve on the next iteration. And that can be Usefull ffor your team or for the client. Then. you can feed those inputs and then the AI will work on that and give you back what it found was important and then you can use it as the base for discussion.
Found a real example on that following link:
